name: strike_ball_simple
description: Strikes a ball toward a goal using basic vector math without numpy.
source_code:
async def strike_ball_simple(ball_name, goal_name):
    import math
    ball_pos = (await get_body_position(ball_name))['position']
    goal_pos = (await get_body_position(goal_name))['position']
    dx = goal_pos[0] - ball_pos[0]
    dy = goal_pos[1] - ball_pos[1]
    dist = math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)
    ux = dx / dist
    uy = dy / dist
    wind_up = [ball_pos[0] - ux * 0.2, ball_pos[1] - uy * 0.2]
    follow_through = [ball_pos[0] + ux * 0.2, ball_pos[1] + uy * 0.2]
    await move_to('hand', wind_up[0], wind_up[1], 0.03, duration=1000)
    await move_to('hand', follow_through[0], follow_through[1], 0.03, duration=300)
    return {'success': True}
